author: bharath.vedartham
content: the bids where builder balance is greater than amount is likely a simple issue. In buildoor, we have a builder lifecycle where we update the builders staked collateral as it falls below a certain threshold, there is likely a timing game issu between the top up and sending the bid. We infact shouldn't send bids if we don't have enough balance lmaoo. But this issue was masked cause we top up regularly and we have infinite money on devnets
